message:
fix(freeze): add frame->args array for closures with captured variables

Fixed frozen code generation bug where closures with captured variables tried to access
`frame->args[N]` but the frame struct only had `JSValue result`.

Changes:
- Add `JSValue args[N]` to frame struct when closure_var_indices.len > 0
- Initialize args array from closure variables passed in argv[arg_count]
- Array size based on max closure variable index

This allows frozen closures to update captured variables via set_arg opcode.

Note: Claude Code bundle (55MB) compiles successfully with 2632 frozen functions,
but hangs after frozen_init - needs further investigation.
